example_curl:
curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/generate-description \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'X-API-Key: sk-shopify-importer-demo-key-2024' \
  -d '{
    "sku": "TXT004",
    "raw_product_name": "yün battaniye çift kişilik",
    "category": "battaniye",
    "brand": "Yataş",
    "color": "gri",
    "size": "200x220",
    "material": "Yün",
    "price": 675.00,
    "stock": 25
  }'
example_python:
import httpx

response = httpx.post(
    'http://localhost:8000/generate-description',
    headers={
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'X-API-Key': 'sk-shopify-importer-demo-key-2024'
    },
    json={
        'sku': 'TXT004',
        'raw_product_name': 'yün battaniye çift kişilik',
        'category': 'battaniye',
        'brand': 'Yataş',
        'color': 'gri',
        'size': '200x220',
        'material': 'Yün',
        'price': 675.00,
        'stock': 25
    }
)
print(response.json())
